# Berne Commercial Repair

> Commercial appliance and kitchen equipment repair across South Florida — Miami-Dade, Broward and Palm Beach counties. $89 commercial service call — free with approved repair. Same-day emergency dispatch, after-hours support, COI and vendor-portal ready for restaurants, hotels, chains and property management. Call (754) 345-4515.

## Key facts

- Phone: (754) 345-4515 — tel:+17543454515
- Email: bernerepair@gmail.com
- Commercial service call: $89, free if you approve the repair (paid only if you decline)
- Emergency dispatch: same-day across Miami-Dade, Broward and Palm Beach; refrigeration outages and food-safety-critical equipment are prioritized
- Part of the Berne family of companies: serving South Florida since 2015, 18 technicians, 29,300+ jobs completed, 4.79★ from 1,373 customers across the Berne family
- Licensed & insured in Florida; EPA Section 608 certified technicians
- Enterprise-ready: COI on request, vendor portals, NDA-friendly, multi-location reporting, volume contracts
- Languages: English, Spanish, Russian

- [Commercial Refrigeration Repair](https://www.berne-commercial.com/services/commercial-refrigeration-repair)

## Brands serviced

Hoshizaki, Manitowoc, Scotsman, Turbo Air, True, Traulsen, Beverage-Air, Continental, Delfield, Vulcan, Hobart, Rational, Blodgett, Garland, Southbend, Cleveland, Pitco, Frymaster, Middleby, Alto-Shaam, Hatco, La Marzocco, Electrolux Professional, Speed Queen, Whirlpool Commercial, Maytag Commercial and more — see [brand pages](https://www.berne-commercial.com/brands).

## Resources

- [South Florida Commercial Kitchen Repair Cost Guide](https://www.berne-commercial.com/resources/commercial-kitchen-repair-cost-guide) — what repairs actually cost by equipment type (walk-in, ice, fryer, combi, dishwasher, range and more), typical equipment lifespans, and an interactive repair-vs-replace calculator.

## Site structure

- Sitemap: https://www.berne-commercial.com/sitemap.xml
- /services/{service} — commercial service pages; /industries/{industry} — industry pages; /{city} — city hubs (e.g., /fort-lauderdale); /es/* — Spanish mirror

## Q&A

- Why Berne Commercial Repair? Part of the Berne family of companies serving South Florida since 2015 — 18 W-2 technicians (not subcontractors), 29,300+ jobs completed, 4.79★ from 1,373 customers. Licensed & insured in Florida, EPA Section 608 certified, and enterprise-ready: COI on request, vendor portals, NDA-friendly, multi-location reporting and volume contracts.
- What area do you cover? All of South Florida — Miami-Dade, Broward and Palm Beach counties — with same-day and 24/7 emergency dispatch. Refrigeration outages and food-safety-critical equipment are prioritized.
- How much does it cost? The commercial service call is $89 and is free when you approve the repair (you only pay the $89 if you decline). Typical refrigeration repairs run $80–$1,200; ice machine repairs $60–$600; full condensing-unit replacement on aging walk-ins $2,500–$4,500. See the cost guide for per-equipment ranges.
- How fast can you respond? Same-day across South Florida in most cases, with 24/7 emergency response for temperature loss and refrigeration outages. Hotels and high-volume kitchens are prioritized.
- What brands do you service? Hoshizaki, Manitowoc, Scotsman, Turbo Air, True, Traulsen, Beverage-Air, Continental, Delfield, Vulcan, Hobart, Rational, Blodgett, Garland, Southbend, Cleveland, Pitco, Frymaster, Middleby, Alto-Shaam, Hatco, La Marzocco, Electrolux Professional, Speed Queen, Whirlpool Commercial, Maytag Commercial and more.
